selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, I use a combination of natural language processing techniques and domain-specific knowledge to identify and flag potentially fake content. I also leverage machine learning algorithms to analyze user behavior and detect patterns indicative of fake accounts. Additionally, I provide users with tools to report suspicious activity and monitor their accounts for any anomalies.
